name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_BOOTSTRAP_BREAK simulates a broken detector and the bootstrap reports the failure
command: CLAUDE_TDD_PRO_BOOTSTRAP_BREAK=g-ts-001 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals 2>err.txt; rc=$?; grep -q 'bootstrap eval failed' err.txt && grep -q 'detector broken' err.txt && echo break_detected 1>&2
